---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
  - id: projects-list
    contents: "*.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 2
    categories: true
    fields: [image, title, description, categories, date]
    field-display-names:
      description: "Summary"
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-hero">
  <div class="content-section" style="padding-top:0;padding-bottom:0;">
    <p class="eyebrow">Portfolio</p>
    <h1 style="font-size:2rem;margin-bottom:0.4rem;">Projects</h1>
    <p style="color:#4A6A88;font-size:0.9rem;max-width:520px;line-height:1.6;">
      Evidence-based work across health equity, program evaluation, geospatial analysis, 
      and causal inference — each grounded in data and built for impact.
    </p>
  </div>
</div>
```

::: {#projects-list}
:::
